title: Supreme Court unhappy over CBI, ED ‘reluctance’ against Anil Ambani firms, calls for ‘fair, dispassionate’ investigation
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The Supreme Court has expressed strong displeasure with the CBI and Enforcement Directorate (ED).
*   This displeasure stems from the agencies' perceived 'reluctance' in pursuing investigations against firms associated with Anil Ambani.
*   The Court has demanded a 'fair and dispassionate' investigation into these matters.

title: Colombian Air Force plane crashes near Peru border with 110 soldiers onboard; rescue operations underway
content:
A Colombian Air Force plane has crashed.
*   The aircraft was carrying 110 soldiers and went down near the Peru border.
*   Rescue operations are currently underway.

title: Prolonged war to be detrimental to the broader global outlook: RBI bulletin
content:
A prolonged global conflict is projected to have a detrimental effect on the broader global outlook.
*   This assessment was issued by the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) in its latest bulletin.
*   The RBI's report highlights the negative consequences for global stability and economic prospects.

title: Avoid insinuations without evidence, says SEBI Chief on HDFC Bank chairman’s exit
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   The SEBI Chief has advised against making insinuations without concrete evidence.
*   This statement specifically addresses the discussions and speculation surrounding the recent exit of the HDFC Bank chairman.
*   He is urging the public and media to rely on facts and avoid unfounded rumors.

title: Israel's missile defence under scrutiny after Iran strikes nuke research facility
content:
Israel's missile defense system is currently under intense scrutiny.
*   This questioning follows recent strikes carried out by Iran.
*   The Iranian attacks reportedly targeted a nuclear research facility.

title: NASA reports Russian spacecraft antenna problem: Forced manual docking with ISS
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the news headline:

*   NASA reported an antenna problem on a Russian spacecraft.
*   The issue forced the spacecraft to abandon its automated docking system.
*   Crew members were required to manually dock the spacecraft with the International Space Station (ISS).

title: Supreme Court gives Centre four-week leeway to respond to petition on airfare hike, says govt. handling ‘bigger problems now’
content:
The Supreme Court has granted the Centre a four-week extension to respond to a petition regarding airfare hikes.
*   This leeway is to allow the government to formulate its official response to concerns over rising air travel costs.
*   The court justified the extension by noting that the government is currently dealing with "bigger problems."

title: Anil Ambani bank fraud case: Supreme Court says CBI, ED showed reluctance
content:
The Supreme Court has stated that the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) and Enforcement Directorate (ED) showed "reluctance."
*   This observation was made in the context of the bank fraud case involving businessman Anil Ambani.
*   The apex court's comment highlights concerns over the investigative agencies' handling of the high-profile case.

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: BJP seal on Election Commission of India letter sparks row in State
content:
A controversy has erupted in Kerala after the BJP's official seal was found on a letter from the Election Commission of India (ECI).
*   The incident has sparked a significant political row in the state, particularly in the context of the upcoming 2026 Assembly Elections.
*   The dispute centers on questions regarding the impartiality of the ECI and potential political influence.
